common.requestFailed: Request failed. Check that the backend is running and try again.

connect.title: Live data (IBKR)
connect.subtitle: Connect to your local IB Gateway (read-only) to view account data and import executions.
connect.backendDown: Can't reach the local backend at {url}. Start it: cd backend && python app.py
connect.noExecutions: No recent executions returned by the gateway.
connect.privacyNote: Account and position data stay in memory only — never saved. Only trades you import are stored.
connect.flexHint: Full trade history from IBKR Account Management (Flex Query XML). Parsed in your browser; only stock (STK) trades import this milestone.
connect.flexParseError: Could not parse this file as an IBKR Flex statement.
connect.flexEmpty: No stock trades found in this statement.

auth.signInSubtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to your journal.
auth.errEmailExists: An account with that email already exists.
auth.errBackendDown: Can't reach the server. Start the backend and try again.
auth.errGoogleFailed: Google sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
auth.errGoogleNotConfigured: Google sign-in isn't configured on the server.
auth.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.verifyIntro: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {email}.
auth.resetIntro: Enter your account email and we will send you a reset code.
auth.resetCodeIntro: If an account exists for {email}, a 6-digit code is on its way. Enter it with your new password.
auth.resetDone: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
auth.errCodeExpired: That code has expired. Request a new one.
auth.errTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts — that code is no longer valid. Request a new one.
auth.errResendCooldown: A code was just sent. Wait a minute before requesting another.
auth.errMailNotConfigured: Email sending is not configured on the server.
auth.errTooManyLogins: Too many failed attempts. Try again in about {min} min.

library.title: Strategy Library
library.subtitle: Browse curated playbooks and adopt the ones you trade into your workspace.
library.searchPlaceholder: Search strategies by name, summary, or tag…

journal.title: Trade Journal
journal.subtitle: Record trades and review your full history.
journal.formHint: Leave exit price and close date blank to log an open position. Both are required together to close a trade.
journal.empty: No trades match these filters. Record one above to get started.
journal.deleteBody: This removes the {ticker} trade opened on {date}. This cannot be undone.

reports.title: Performance Reports
reports.subtitle: Win rate, gain/loss ratio, holding period, and concentration — overall or per playbook.
reports.empty: No trades yet. Record some in the Journal to see your performance.
reports.holdingSub: Closed trades grouped by days held
reports.concentrationSub: Share of capital at risk by ticker (cost basis)

admin.title: Admin · Playbook Library
admin.subtitle: Curate the strategy playbooks available to all users.
admin.empty: No playbooks yet. Create one to populate the library.
admin.name: Name
admin.zhHint: Chinese fields are optional. When blank, the strategy falls back to English for 中文 users.
admin.deleteBody: This removes “{name}” from the library for everyone. Trades already tagged with it keep their reference. This cannot be undone.

validation.quantityPositive: Quantity must be a positive number.
validation.entryPositive: Entry price must be a positive number.
validation.exitPositive: Exit price must be a positive number.
validation.closePair: To close a trade, provide both exit price and close date.
validation.closeBeforeOpen: Close date cannot be before the open date.

migrate.title: Upload local data to your account
migrate.body: We found {n} trades saved on this device that are not in your account yet. Upload them now? Duplicates are skipped automatically.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Password and account security.
settings.pwSuccess: Password updated. Other devices have been signed out.
settings.oauthNoPassword: This account signs in with Google and has no password yet.
settings.oauthSetupHint: You can set one through the password-reset flow (you will be signed out first).
settings.othersSignedOut: All other devices have been signed out.
settings.dangerText: Deleting your account permanently removes all trades, adoptions, and settings. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteEmailLabel: Type your account email to confirm
settings.deleteConfirmBody: All data for {email} will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
settings.errConfirmMismatch: The email does not match this account.
